message:
chore: add ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add ignore rules for core dumps, profiling data, agent config
backups, clippy output, SQLite corruption artifacts, and other
transient files that clutter git status in multi-agent environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -126,3 +126,29 @@ tests/artifacts/
 
 # Stray bv/CLI artifacts (malformed flag creates files like --graph-format.svg)
 --graph-format*
+
+# Ephemeral files (core dumps, profiling, agent config backups, etc.)
+core.*
+core
+perf.data
+perf.data.old
+*.bak
+clippy.txt
+clippy.json
+clippy_results.json
+clippy_unwrap.json
+clippy_unwrap_clean.txt
+check_output.txt
+error.log
+.next_backup*/
+cline.mcp.json
+opencode.json
+windsurf.mcp.json
+*.mcp.json.*.bak
+storage.sqlite3
+storage.sqlite3-shm
+storage.sqlite3-wal
+storage.sqlite3.bak
+storage.sqlite3.corrupt-*
+storage.sqlite3-shm.corrupt-*
+storage.sqlite3-wal.corrupt-*
